steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "help those companies thrive" shows the exchange can support the growth of small firms.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
"Undergone" means experienced or suffered through — Trofimov lists hardships: hunger, illness, being tossed by fate. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Neglected: ignored or failed to care for — Trofimov is the subject, not someone who neglected others; misreads the grammar. ✗
  • Choice B — Enjoyed: took pleasure in — he describes hunger and illness, not positive experiences. ✗
  • Choice C — Conveyed: communicated or transported — "conveyed a great deal" would mean he communicated much, but context is about personal suffering. ✗
  • Choice D — Endured: suffered through patiently — matches hardship of illness, hunger, and fate's tossing. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
